name: Energy is the T-Object

phase_0.boundary_condition: The Hamiltonian as the T-Object, bounding the system and generating time-translation

VINIT.justification: The zero-point state-space before any Hamiltonian is applied or energy eigenstates are defined

TANCH.justification: The terminal anchor that bounds the system, constitutes time, and acts as the ultimate T-Object

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism propagating the state via the Schrödinger equation e^(-iHt/ℏ)

AREV.justification: Reverse morphism testing the symmetry of the Hamiltonian and mapping descent/dissipation

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of thermodynamic and quantum cycles over time

IMSCRIB.justification: The Hamiltonian recognizes itself as the generator of time-translation, establishing exact energy conservation

FSPLIT.justification: The total energy interaction branches into two distinct thermodynamic paths: Work and Heat

FFUSE.justification: Work and Heat reconstitute the exact Total Energy change, satisfying ΔE = W + Q

EVALT.justification: The affirmative T-arm anchor, representing pure unitary work without entropy production

EVALF.justification: The negative F-arm anchor, representing heat transfer and entropy increase

ENGAGR.justification: A paradice where reversible work and irreversible heat are simultaneously held, as in fluctuation theorems

IFIX.justification: Irreversible fixation into a definite energy eigenstate, permanently recording the outcome

phase_3.void_description: Zero-point vacuum, unmeasured state-space, no energy eigenstates defined
phase_3.true_description: Reversible adiabatic process, unitary evolution, entropy conserved
phase_3.false_description: Irreversible dissipation, heat death, entropy maximized
phase_3.both_description: Quantum thermal fluctuation, fluctuation theorem where forward and reverse paths coexist

steps.domain_action: Quantum Vacuum — genesis of the state-space before any Hamiltonian is applied
Hamiltonian — the terminal anchor that bounds the system and constitutes time (the T-Object)
Noether's Theorem — the Hamiltonian recognizes itself as the generator of time-translation, establishing energy conservation
Unitary Time Evolution — forward morphism propagating the state via e^(-iHt/ℏ)
Energy Transfer — the total energy interaction branches into Work and Heat
Reversible Adiabatic Process — the T-arm anchor, representing pure unitary work without entropy production
Irreversible Dissipation — the F-arm anchor, representing heat transfer and entropy increase
Quantum Thermal Fluctuation — the paradice where reversible work and irreversible heat are simultaneously held
First Law of Thermodynamics — Work and Heat reconstitute the exact Total Energy change, satisfying ΔE = W + Q
Path Integral Composition — sequential chaining of these thermodynamic cycles over time
Time Reversal / CPT Conjugation — the reverse morphism testing the symmetry of the Hamiltonian
Energy Measurement — irreversible fixation into a definite energy eigenstate, recording the outcome
Hamiltonian — the closed boundary re-asserted, completing the cycle

phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The unitary evolution and Frobenius reintegration of Work and Heat conserve total information; only measurement incurs Landauer cost

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → IMSCRIB → AFWD → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALF → ENGAGR → FFUSE → CLINK → AREV → IFIX → TANCH
-- Class: Energy is the T-Object
-- Fingerprint: sig=(7,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=13
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 8)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑠  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑡 → 𐑾  | identity — self-imscription
--   [3] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑠 → 𐑚  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑱  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑙 → 𐑗  | composition — regime coherence
--   [10] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑱 → 𐑭  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑗 → 𐑡  | irreversible fixation — winding number
--   [12] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑭 → 𐑼  | terminal object — connectivity boundary

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def energy_is_the_t_object_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (Quantum Vacuum — genesis of the state-space before any Hamiltonian is applied)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑠)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Hamiltonian — the terminal anchor that bounds the system and constitutes time...)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑡 𐑾)  -- [2] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (Noether's Theorem — the Hamiltonian recognizes itself as the generator of tim...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑠 𐑚)  -- [3] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Unitary Time Evolution — forward morphism propagating the state via e^(-iHt/ℏ))
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (Energy Transfer — the total energy interaction branches into Work and Heat) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (Reversible Adiabatic Process — the T-arm anchor, representing pure unitary wo...)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (Irreversible Dissipation — the F-arm anchor, representing heat transfer and e...)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (Quantum Thermal Fluctuation — the paradice where reversible work and irrevers...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑱)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (First Law of Thermodynamics — Work and Heat reconstitute the exact Total Energy change, satisfying ΔE = W + Q)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑙 𐑗)  -- [9] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (Path Integral Composition — sequential chaining of these thermodynamic cycles...)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑱 𐑭)  -- [10] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Time Reversal / CPT Conjugation — the reverse morphism testing the symmetry o...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑗 𐑡)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (Energy Measurement — irreversible fixation into a definite energy eigenstate,...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑭 𐑼)  -- [12] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (Hamiltonian — the closed boundary re-asserted, completing the cycle)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def energy_is_the_t_object_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (energy_is_the_t_object_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def energy_is_the_t_object_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑡 :=
  (energy_is_the_t_object_protocol).restrictToEVALF
